title: Mapping Conceptual to Logical Design
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of transforming an Entity-Relationship (ER) model into a relational database schema.
relationships: Strong Entities map directly to tables
Weak Entities map to tables with a foreign key to owner
1:1 Relationships are merged into a table or create a foreign key
1:M Relationships add a foreign key to the 'many' side table
M:N Relationships map to a new junction table with foreign keys
Multivalued Attributes map to a new table with a foreign key
